page.home: Yucatecan Artisanal Ice Creams | Tradition and Natural Flavor
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.b2b_title: Delight your guests and clients with the best flavor
contact.b2b_desc: We offer special wholesale prices for restaurants, hotels, and businesses, as well as custom ice cream carts and stations for weddings, parties, and corporate events.
about.subtitle: Our Story
about.title: CASFRELA ARTESANAL
about.desc: We provide you with a wide range of products, services, and innovative solutions at incredible prices. Our primary concern is to offer a high level of quality in the products that leave our factory. Needless to say, we are at your disposal to meet your needs, desires, and special orders. We back you up with a team characterized by its cordial treatment and spirit of service.
seasonal.spring_desc: An explosion of freshness with our seasonal fruits. Vibrant flavors that awaken your senses with the sweetest selection from Casfrela.
seasonal.summer_desc: The perfect antidote to the Yucatecan heat. Pure refreshment in every bite, ideal for enjoying under the Mayan sun.
seasonal.autumn_desc: Creamy textures and traditional flavors that comfort the soul. The heritage of Yucatán in our dairy desserts.
why.natural_desc: Only real fruits and dairy products selected directly from source.
why.traditional_desc: We maintain the flavor that has passed from generation to generation.
why.daily_desc: We guarantee maximum freshness in each of our products.
gallery.title: Our Moments
gallery.label: Our Collection
gallery.subtitle: Every image is a bite of Yucatecan tradition and flavor.
footer.brand_desc: Authentic Yucatecan tradition and natural flavor. Bringing local freshness to your palate.
footer.social_desc: Follow and contact us to place your order or request an event quote.
products.intro_desc: All our fruits are seasonal and fresh, to get the pulp with the best flavor possible, the shells are selected through a process to stay only with the best and give a quality presentation to the product making them very eye-catching. We search all over the Mexican Republic for all the fruits we use since clinical changes and weather inclemencies make the situations of those who harvest each of our ingredients very changeable. The flavors, colors and sizes of the fruits can change depending on each season, so any of these variations is fully understandable since we depend on what nature provides us.
products.ice_fresa.title: Strawberry Ice Cream
products.ice_fresa.short: Made with natural strawberries and farm cream.
products.ice_fresa.desc: Delicious artisanal ice cream prepared with the highest quality fresh strawberries and authentic farm cream. A classic, creamy flavor full of tradition you can't miss.
products.ice_mango_yogurt.title: Mango Yogurt
products.ice_mango_yogurt.short: Creamy and full of tropical vitamins.
products.ice_mango_yogurt.desc: Our mango frozen yogurt combines the smoothness of natural yogurt with the freshness and sweetness of the best tropical mangos. A healthy, refreshing, and irresistible option.
products.ice_queso_bola.title: Queso de Bola
products.ice_queso_bola.short: The traditional flavor of our land.
products.ice_queso_bola.desc: The iconic flavor of Yucatán turned into ice cream. A perfect sweet-salty mix, made with authentic Queso de Bola (Edam). A Yucatecan classic that will delight your palate.
products.ice_pina_colada.title: Piña Colada
products.ice_pina_colada.short: A refreshing mix for the heat.
products.ice_pina_colada.desc: Enjoy Caribbean freshness with our Piña Colada ice cream. An exquisite combination of natural pineapple and smooth coconut cream that will transport you directly to the beach.
products.ice_mamey.title: Mamey Ice Cream
products.ice_mamey.short: Tradition in every bite, pure mamey cream.
products.ice_mamey.desc: A Yucatecan classic prepared with the sweetest and creamiest mamey from the region. Its smooth texture and vibrant color will remind you of home's authentic flavors.
products.ice_chocolate.title: Yucatecan Chocolate
products.ice_chocolate.desc: Intense, artisanal, and made with the best cocoa from Mayan lands. A perfect and balanced treat for true chocolate lovers.
products.ice_vainilla.title: Vanilla
products.ice_vainilla.desc: Traditional vanilla flavor, made with selected pods. A subtly sweet and perfectly balanced dessert.
products.ice_nuez.title: Walnut
products.ice_nuez.desc: Delicious whipped cream base mixed with finely chopped walnuts for a crunchy touch in every spoonful.
products.ice_coco.title: Coconut
products.ice_coco.desc: All the tropical flavor contained in this exquisite blend of artisanal cream and fresh natural coconut shavings.
products.ice_pistache.title: Pistachio
products.ice_pistache.desc: Unmistakable high-quality pistachio flavor. Its creamy texture perfectly complements the small and delicious chunks.
products.ice_guanabana.title: Soursop
products.ice_guanabana.desc: A unique ice cream highlighting the delicate tropical balance of fresh soursop, paying homage to our regional fruits.
products.ice_limon.title: Lemon
products.ice_limon.desc: Water or milk-based, our lemon ice cream offers the exact level of freshness to combat warm days.
products.ice_dulce_leche.title: Dulce de Leche
products.ice_dulce_leche.desc: Ideal for those with a sweet tooth. Thick and sweet texture, with authentic homemade dulce de leche that melts in the mouth.
products.ice_maracuya.title: Passion Fruit
products.ice_maracuya.short: Intense flavor of the passion fruit.
products.ice_maracuya.desc: Sweet, creamy, and with that distinctive tangy point of passion fruit. A true party for your taste buds.
products.ice_cafe.title: Coffee
products.ice_cafe.desc: Made with selected artisanally roasted beans. Revitalizing and with a deep coffee aroma.
products.ice_zarzamora.title: Blackberry
products.ice_zarzamora.desc: All the essence of wild blackberries in a smooth consistency and bright purple color. Completely natural.
products.ice_queso_zarzamora.title: Cheese & Blackberry
products.ice_queso_zarzamora.desc: Light cream cheese base subtly mixed with an exquisite and sweet natural blackberry jam.
products.ice_rompope.title: Eggnog
products.ice_rompope.desc: Authentic eggnog turned into a smooth and delicious ice cream. Its comforting homemade flavor simply fascinates.
products.ice_menta_choco.title: Mint Chocolate
products.ice_menta_choco.desc: Super fresh mint accompanied by high-quality chocolate chunks. An unmatched and refreshing contrast.
products.ice_tamarindo.title: Tamarind
products.ice_tamarindo.short: The perfect sweet and tangy mix.
products.ice_tamarindo.desc: Made with authentic natural tamarind pulp. Excellent option to refresh the sunniest afternoons in Yucatán.
products.ice_pitahaya.title: Dragon Fruit
products.ice_pitahaya.desc: Taking advantage of the exquisite Yucatecan dragon fruit, we offer this visually spectacular and subtly sweet ice cream.
products.ice_naranja.title: Orange
products.ice_naranja.desc: Refreshing sorbet made with pure orange juice from our land, the ideal balance between sweet and citrus.
products.ice_almendra.title: Almond
products.ice_almendra.desc: A gourmet recipe highlighting the light and delicate notes of almonds, creating an exquisite cream.
products.ice_mango_chile.title: Mango with Chili
products.ice_mango_chile.desc: All the sweetness of Ataulfo mango combined with a touch of chili powder that generates a delicious contrast.
products.ice_arroz_leche.title: Rice Pudding
products.ice_arroz_leche.short: Like a homemade dessert but cold.
products.ice_arroz_leche.desc: Warm essence turned into ice cream. A touch of cinnamon and soft rice that make this dessert a true gem.
products.ice_chicle.title: Blue Bubblegum
products.ice_chicle.desc: Super fun, creamy, and with colors that kids and adults love. Relive the fun of your childhood.
products.pal_fresa.title: Strawberry Pop
products.pal_fresa.desc: Water-based with real chunks of fresh strawberries harvested this season. Light, sweet, and super refreshing.
products.pal_mango.title: Mango Pop
products.pal_mango.short: Straight from the tree and very refreshing.
products.pal_mango.desc: The queen of the tropics made into a popsicle. Smooth consistency thanks to the sweet and juicy pulp of the best mango.
products.pal_coco.title: Coconut Pop
products.pal_coco.desc: Very creamy dairy base with authentic sweet coconut shavings. A southern treat.
products.pal_limon.title: Lemon Pop
products.pal_limon.short: The best remedy for the heat.
products.pal_limon.desc: Simple, pure, and refreshing. Freshly squeezed lemon juice.
products.pal_chocolate.title: Chocolate Pop
products.pal_chocolate.desc: Semi-dark chocolate in a cream and whole milk base.
products.pal_tamarindo.title: Tamarind Pop
products.pal_tamarindo.desc: Concentrated pulp from naturally boiled tamarind.
products.pal_nuez.title: Walnut Pop
products.pal_nuez.desc: Creamy homemade recipe with embedded fine walnut chunks.
products.pal_vainilla.title: Vanilla Pop
products.pal_vainilla.short: A smooth delight that never fails.
products.pal_vainilla.desc: Sweet, pale yellow color, and with pure natural extract.
products.pal_pitahaya.title: Dragon Fruit Pop
products.pal_pitahaya.desc: Made with fresh dragon fruit juice.
products.pal_mamey.title: Mamey Pop
products.pal_mamey.desc: Sweet pulp lightly ground for a touch of texture.
products.pal_pina.title: Pineapple Pop
products.pal_sandia.title: Watermelon Pop
products.pal_sandia.desc: Feels like biting into freshly chopped cold watermelon.
products.pal_chamoyada.title: Chamoyada Pop
products.pal_chamoyada.short: With chili and chamoy in the center.
products.pal_chamoyada.desc: Fabulous frozen popsicle with chamoy ice coating.
products.pal_uva.title: Grape Pop
products.pal_uva.desc: Water popsicle with real grape extract, perfect to purify the palate on a hot day.
products.pal_naranja.title: Orange Pop
products.pal_naranja.desc: We squeeze the Yucatecan orange to freeze it. Super natural.
products.pal_zarzamora.title: Blackberry Pop
products.pal_zarzamora.desc: A fruit-filled and vibrant popsicle made with chunks and natural blackberry essence.
products.pal_queso_zarzamora.title: Cheese-Blackberry Pop
products.pal_queso_zarzamora.desc: Half cheesecake flavor and half red fruit explosion.
products.pal_rompope.title: Eggnog Pop
products.pal_rompope.desc: Directly from the traditional eggnog flask and turned into a dense and creamy popsicle.
products.pal_chicle.title: Bubblegum Pop
products.pal_chicle.desc: The house favorites for the little ones, a party in your mouth.
products.pal_guayaba.title: Guava Pop
products.pal_guayaba.desc: Recipe based on the sweet seasonal fruit. Transports you immediately.
products.pal_esquisita.title: Exquisite Pop
products.pal_esquisita.desc: A confidential dairy-based recipe with light golden chunks. You have to try it.
products.pal_fresa_leche.title: Creamy Strawberry Pop
products.pal_fresa_leche.desc: The dairy variation of our fruit icon.
products.pal_almendra.title: Almond Pop
products.pal_almendra.desc: Sweet nutty notes with smooth and creamy whole milk.
products.pal_papaya.title: Papaya Pop
products.pal_papaya.desc: Taking advantage of the sweet regional Maradol papaya for a tropical and excellent bite.
products.pal_cafe.title: Coffee Pop
products.pal_cafe.desc: Revitalize your day with our delicious creamy blend infused with wood-roasted coffee.
products.pal_melon.title: Melon Pop
products.pal_melon.desc: Simply magical. One bite and you'll forget it's 40 degrees outside.

cta.title: Ready for a flavor you'll never forget?
cta.subtitle: Artisanal ice creams made with love and the finest ingredients from yucatán. Place your order, quote an event, or just say hi. We're here to sweeten your day!
social.cta_subtitle: Reach out through any of our social networks and we'll get back to you quickly with the best personalized offer.
social.cta_note: We will get back to you as soon as possible with the best quote!
events.desc_inicio: We have brought the freshness of Yucatan to various corners. Discover our history in each event.
events.e1_desc: Ice Cream and Dessert Festival. Join us April 4-5 at Parque de la Paz!
upcoming.title: Upcoming Events
upcoming.desc: Join us in our next icy adventures! Don't miss the chance to enjoy the best of Yucatán.
events.e2_desc: Present in the best entrepreneurship spaces.
events.hero_subtitle: Captures of our participation in fairs, bazaars and special celebrations.
events.feed_desc: Follow us on our social networks to be aware of our next destinations.
products.bomba_chocolate.title: Chocolate Bomb
products.bomba_chocolate.desc: Our exclusive Chocolate Bomb is a high-quality chocolate sphere that, when in contact with hot milk, reveals a magic mix of marshmallows and cocoa. A unique sensory experience.
hero.tagline: Unique flavors handcrafted with fresh seasonal fruits and recipes passed down through generations.
promo.title: Ready to order?
promo.desc: Add your favorites to the cart and order directly via WhatsApp in seconds.
upcoming.coming_desc: We're preparing something delicious for you. Stay tuned!
upcoming.follow_us: Follow us on social media to be the first to know where we'll be and what surprises we have in store.
